title: FINTIE Case Compatible with iPad Pro 12.9 inch (2022/2021/2020/2018, 6th/5th/4th/3rd Generation), Multi-Angle Smart Stand Cover w/Pencil Holder & Pocket, Auto Sleep/Wake, Blooming Hibiscus
features: Compatible with iPad Pro 12.9 inch 6th Generation 2022, iPad Pro 12.9-inch 5th Generation 2021 (A2378/A2379/A2461/A2462), iPad Pro 12.9 inch 4th Generation 2020 (A2229/A2069/A2232/A2233), iPad Pro 12.9 inch 3rd Gen 2018 (A1876/A2014/A1895).
Seamlessly supports Pencil 2nd Gen magnetic and wireless charging when the case is on. Built-in Pencil holder securely carries and protects your Pencil 2nd Gen, wherever you go.
Easy clip-on application. Built-in magnetic strip automatically wakes or puts your device to sleep when the lid is opened and closed.
Built from premium composition leather exterior and soft microfiber interior - snug fit, durable and protective.
This case allows you to adjust the tablet to multiple angles securely. Document Card Pocket is designed for you to store your business cards, bank cards, notes, or bills.

Protect your iPad with this FINITE Multi-Angle Viewing Case at all times! The Case sports a simple and classy design made from premium PU leather, and the interior is lined with soft microfiber material that protects your tablet from prints, dirt, and scratches. Compatibility: Compatible with iPad Pro 12.9 inch 6th Generation 2022 Compatible with iPad Pro 12.9 inch 5th Generation 2021 (Model:A2378/A2379/A2461/A2462) Compatible with iPad Pro 12.9 inch 4th Generation 2020 (Model:(A2229/A2069/A2232/A2233)) Compatible with iPad Pro 12.9 inch 3rd Generation 2018 (Model: A1876/A2014/A1895) The case will not fit other devices, please check the exact model of your device before purchasing! Features: Built-in Stand: three anti-slip stripes, propping up the tablet for considerate sturdy standing view angles and typing feature. Front Pocket: a large front Document Pocket to store your business cards, bank cards, notes, bills, or other personal belongings while on the go. Easy to Use: insert your tablet in the open pocket and secure it in place with the fastener flap. Simply open and close to activate wake/sleep modes. Precise cutouts: all features of the tablet are accessible even with the case on. PLEASE NOTE: Package ONLY INCLUDE one protective case for iPad 12.9 inch, other devices like the tablet and the pencil is not included in the package.
